category_sources: source_facts.description says icann-rdap is a Registry Data Access Protocol client sponsored by ICANN; official manual describes ICANN RDAP command-line tools and RDAP implementation.
display_name_sources: Official users manual at https://icann.github.io/icann-rdap/ uses the title ICANN RDAP Users Manual.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki says legacy documentation has moved to the online user's manual at https://icann.github.io/icann-rdap/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/icann/icann-rdap, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official users manual identify RDAP client/test tooling for registry data access.
